description: Style NoteGet ready to float in comfort and style with these lightweight Wedge floaters from adidas. Comfortable yet sturdy, these sandals are great for a stroll in the park or a walk on a trek trail. Product DetailsBlunt toed floaters in light brown with an upraised heelSynthetic forefoot, midfoot and ankle loop straps with Velcro closuresRubber footbed with groovesTPU outsole with terraced lugsMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
